category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Chile) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Chile Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入智利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入智利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Chilean requirements: SEC electrical product approval and marking, NCh adoption of IEC 62133, SUBTEL radio approvals, Ministry of Energy labeling expectations, UN 38.3 transport evidence, and importer-led market access via ports such as Valparaiso and San Antonio.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源与智利要求对照：SEC电气类产品认证与合规标识、INN NCh对IEC 62133体系的采用、SUBTEL无线核准、能源部能效标签要求、UN 38.3运输证据，以及以瓦尔帕莱索、圣安东尼奥等口岸为入口的进口商责任。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源與智利要求對照：SEC電氣類產品認證與合規標識、INN NCh對IEC 62133體系的採用、SUBTEL無線核准、能源部能效標籤要求、UN 38.3運輸證據，以及以瓦爾巴萊索、聖安東尼奧等港口為入口的進口商責任。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Chile generally need SEC scope clearance and an importer-led evidence chain including in-scope SEC labeling pathway, INN NCh/IEC 62133 safety alignment, SUBTEL radio approvals for wireless functions, and UN 38.3 transport documentation. Chinese GB / GB T standards and CCC records remain China-side evidence and are not a direct substitute for Chilean obligations.
answer_first.zh: 面向智利出口的中国锂电池及移动电源通常需满足SEC适用范围内的准入要求，并由进口商建立完整证据链，包括SEC标识路径、INN NCh/IEC 62133电池安全对齐、无线功能的SUBTEL核准以及UN 38.3运输文件。中国GB/GBT标准及CCC记录属于中国侧证据，不能直接替代智利义务。
answer_first.zht: 面向智利出口的中國鋰電池及行動電源通常需滿足SEC適用範圍內的准入要求，並由進口商建立完整證據鏈，包括SEC標識路徑、INN NCh/IEC 62133電池安全對齊、無線功能的SUBTEL核准以及UN 38.3運輸文件。中國GB/GBT標準及CCC記錄屬於中國側證據，不能直接替代智利義務。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or if SEC, INN, SUBTEL, energy labeling, or UN 38.3 transport guidance changes.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official source URL, access date, and verification flag.
